title: If an employee dies after his right of action has arisen under
content:
Last updated date
29.6.2017
Employment Ordinance
Eighth Schedule—Part I	
S8-2
	
Cap. 57
Verified Copy
Part VIA of this Ordinance on employment protection but before 
the adjudication of the claim, the claim shall be actionable by a 
personal representative of the deceased employee.

metadata.source_file: Cap 57 Consolidated version for the Whole Chapter (24-08-2025) (English).pdf
